additional_rules.name: unsanitized-input-in-db-call
additional_rules.message: Unsanitized req.body/req.params passed to database call — validate and sanitize input first
additional_rules.fix_hint: Validate input with Zod/class-validator before passing to the database layer. Use parameterized queries or ORM methods, never string interpolation.

additional_rules.name: missing-next-err-in-error-handler
additional_rules.message: Missing next(err) in catch block — errors may be swallowed silently
additional_rules.fix_hint: Call next(err) in catch blocks within Express middleware/route handlers to propagate errors to the global error handler.

additional_rules.name: commonjs-require
additional_rules.message: CommonJS require() used — prefer ESM import syntax in TypeScript
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace require('module') with import module from 'module' or import { named } from 'module'.

additional_rules.name: console-log-in-production
additional_rules.message: console.log in production code — use a structured logger (winston, pino) instead
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace console.log/warn/error with a structured logger instance.

additional_boundaries.name: Routes must not import database directly
Controllers must not import database directly
